Package com.example.getoutthere.event

Class EventDetailsActivity

android.app.Activity
androidx.core.app.ComponentActivity
androidx.activity.ComponentActivity
androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
com.example.getoutthere.event.EventDetailsActivity
All Implemented Interfaces:
androidx.activity.contextaware.ContextAware, androidx.activity.FullyDrawnReporterOwner, androidx.activity.OnBackPressedDispatcherOwner, androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultCaller, androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultRegistryOwner, androidx.appcompat.app.ActionBarDrawerToggle.DelegateProvider, androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatCallback, androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat.OnRequestPermissionsResultCallback, androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat.RequestPermissionsRequestCodeValidator, androidx.core.app.OnMultiWindowModeChangedProvider, androidx.core.app.OnNewIntentProvider, androidx.core.app.OnPictureInPictureModeChangedProvider, androidx.core.app.OnUserLeaveHintProvider, androidx.core.app.TaskStackBuilder.SupportParentable, androidx.core.content.OnConfigurationChangedProvider, androidx.core.content.OnTrimMemoryProvider, androidx.core.view.KeyEventDispatcher.Component, androidx.core.view.MenuHost, androidx.lifecycle.HasDefaultViewModelProviderFactory, androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleOwner, androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelStoreOwner, androidx.navigationevent.NavigationEventDispatcherOwner, androidx.savedstate.SavedStateRegistryOwner
public class EventDetailsActivity extends androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
Displays detailed information about a specific event.

This Activity serves as a Control and View class that pulls specific event data from Firestore and populates the UI. It handles the core logic for allowing users to join or leave the event's waiting list, updating both the local UI state and the remote Firestore database atomically.

Outstanding Issues: - Direct database access is performed within the UI layer, which loosely violates MVC/MVVM separation of concerns. This could be refactored into a Repository. - The logic allows joining a waitlist but does not yet implement the final lottery selection.

    fetchLocationAndJoin()
    Checks for location permissions, fetches the user's current coordinates, and proceeds to join the waitlist with location data attached.
    private boolean
    isRegistrationOpen()
    Checks whether the current time falls within the event's registration period.
    private void
    joinWaitingList(Double latitude, Double longitude)
    Adds the entrant to the Firestore waitingList subcollection and updates the event's capacity limit.
    protected void
    onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState)
    Initializes the Activity, fetches the Entrant's device ID, parses the event ID passed via Intent, and queries Firestore to populate the UI.

    onRequestPermissionsResult(int requestCode, String[] permissions, int[] grantResults)
    Handles the permission request response for location access.
    private void
    showCommentsDialog()
    Creates and displays a dialog containing a real-time feed of event comments, along with an input field to submit new comments.
    private void
    showLotteryCriteriaDialog()
    Displays an info about the lottery selection criteria
    (package private) void
    updateSpotsUI()
    Calculates the remaining spots available by subtracting the current waitlist count from the Waitlist capacity limit, and updates the UI TextView accordingly.
    (package private) void
    updateToggleButton()
    Toggles the UI state of the waitlist button, changing its text and color depending on whether the current user is already on the waiting list.

  • Method Details

    • onCreate

      protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState)
      Initializes the Activity, fetches the Entrant's device ID, parses the event ID passed via Intent, and queries Firestore to populate the UI. Sets up listeners for joining/leaving the waitlist.
      Overrides:
      onCreate in class androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
      Parameters:
      savedInstanceState - If the activity is being re-initialized after previously being shut down then this Bundle contains the data it most recently supplied. Otherwise it is null.

    • updateSpotsUI

      void updateSpotsUI()
      Calculates the remaining spots available by subtracting the current waitlist count from the Waitlist capacity limit, and updates the UI TextView accordingly.

    • isRegistrationOpen

      private boolean isRegistrationOpen()
      Checks whether the current time falls within the event's registration period.
      Returns:
      true if registration is currently open, false otherwise

    • showLotteryCriteriaDialog

      private void showLotteryCriteriaDialog()
      Displays an info about the lottery selection criteria

    • updateToggleButton

      void updateToggleButton()
      Toggles the UI state of the waitlist button, changing its text and color depending on whether the current user is already on the waiting list.

    • showCommentsDialog

      private void showCommentsDialog()
      Creates and displays a dialog containing a real-time feed of event comments, along with an input field to submit new comments.

    • displayTeamData

    • fetchLocationAndJoin

      private void fetchLocationAndJoin()
      Checks for location permissions, fetches the user's current coordinates, and proceeds to join the waitlist with location data attached.

    • onRequestPermissionsResult

      public void onRequestPermissionsResult(int requestCode, @NonNull String[] permissions, @NonNull int[] grantResults)
      Handles the permission request response for location access.
      Specified by:
      onRequestPermissionsResult in interface androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat.OnRequestPermissionsResultCallback
      Overrides:
      onRequestPermissionsResult in class androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity

    • joinWaitingList

      private void joinWaitingList(Double latitude, Double longitude)
      Adds the entrant to the Firestore waitingList subcollection and updates the event's capacity limit.
      Parameters:
      latitude - The user's latitude (null if geolocation is not required)
      longitude - The user's longitude (null if geolocation is not required)
